title: Japanese Racing Association campaign
wikitext:
[]: Japanese Racing Association campaign             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 08, 2012 10:17 pm JRA and Eva collaboration. Eva horses? lol okay. http://www.cinematoday.jp/page/N0046657 http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QUfJntQCR0c http://twitpic.com/b2g2s6 Probably news on Minna No Eva Fan at some point besides Tweets: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/ 40 days remain until 11/17, where's the Q related posters/trailers?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Oct 08, 2012 10:51 pm Eva horses? So does someone ride it or do they shove an entry plug inside and control it that way?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue Oct 09, 2012 12:26 am Horses and no Evangelion "Gangnam Style"? I am disappoint. Sho-horsey looks unexpectedly badass, however.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Oct 09, 2012 1:11 am I would ride that Eva Horse to victory. +1 for reference.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Oct 09, 2012 1:32 pm I find horses intrinsically hilarious, so this is right up my alley.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Tue Oct 09, 2012 1:33 pm Bollocks. I was hoping it would have something to do with Kamui Kobayashi wearing an Eva-themed helmet at a GP in the not-too-distant future.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Oct 09, 2012 4:41 pm Maybe the horses will be launched from the cage with Kotono Mitsuishi voicing the start of the race?

[]:             Quote Post by Xous » Tue Oct 09, 2012 4:43 pm Wow, I love the design of the Eva-Horse! It reminds me a bit of Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End, in my biased opinion. I wouldn't mind seeing more Eva-Horse in the future, though to be safe I'm content with what they've provided already... I suppose the concept could get incredibly goofy if it went on too long.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Oct 09, 2012 7:32 pm Xous wrote: Wow, I love the design of the Eva-Horse! It reminds me a bit of Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End, in my biased opinion. I wouldn't mind seeing more Eva-Horse in the future, though to be safe I'm content with what they've provided already... I suppose the concept could get incredibly goofy if it went on too long.

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Tue Oct 09, 2012 8:18 pm Xous wrote: Wow, I love the design of the Eva-Horse! It reminds me a bit of Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End, in my biased opinion. I wouldn't mind seeing more Eva-Horse in the future, though to be safe I'm content with what they've provided already... I suppose the concept could get incredibly goofy if it went on too long.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 09, 2012 8:41 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Is there some sort of Animation involved with it, cause it looks bad ass just as a picture.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Oct 09, 2012 9:30 pm What the fuck.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Oct 09, 2012 10:14 pm The first JRA commercials were from April, http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=WDQ5gKhTqII Then another around June: http://jra.jp/news/201206/061402.html And the one you posted was from July. http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1688.html News post from May: http://www.evageeks.org/2012/05/more-evangelion-campaigns-and-collaborations/

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Tue Oct 09, 2012 10:38 pm Hey Fuunsaiki, haven't seen you around in a while.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Oct 10, 2012 9:10 am Fireball wrote: Hey Fuunsaiki, haven't seen you around in a while.

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Wed Oct 10, 2012 9:46 am Indeed this topic needs more Eva-horeses http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rhz0ZutZ59o

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Oct 10, 2012 10:21 am CtHuLhU wrote: Indeed this topic needs more Eva-horeses http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rhz0ZutZ59o

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Oct 10, 2012 5:47 pm CtHuLhU wrote: Indeed this topic needs more Eva-horeses http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rhz0ZutZ59o

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed Oct 10, 2012 9:05 pm I don't know what that commercial is selling, but I'll take 10,000 of them please.

[]:             Quote Post by 0Megabyte » Tue Oct 23, 2012 5:59 am So... has anyone seen these yet? http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=toEcz4inet8 http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=SDDmjsmdcvU http://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=0ShVWTIPnEE
